'''fasuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:drabi|drabi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-s-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:drabi|drabi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fasuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæsichith|fæsichith]] || [[word:fæsichij|fæsichij]] || [[word:fæsichish|fæsichish]] || [[word:fæsichi|fæsichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fasusuchuth|fasusuchuth]] || [[word:fasusuchuj|fasusuchuj]] || [[word:fasusuchush|fasusuchush]] || [[word:fasusuchu|fasusuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fasuchuth|fasuchuth]] || [[word:fasuchuj|fasuchuj]] || [[word:fasuchush|fasuchush]] || [[word:fasuchu|fasuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fasufchuth|fasufchuth]] || [[word:fasufchuj|fasufchuj]] || [[word:fasufchush|fasufchush]] || [[word:fasufchuf|fasufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fasuchuthu|fasuchuthu]] || [[word:fasuchuju|fasuchuju]] || [[word:fasuchushu|fasuchushu]] || [[word:fasuchuku|fasuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fasuchuth|fasuchuth]] || [[word:fasuchuj|fasuchuj]] || [[word:fasuchush|fasuchush]] || [[word:fasuchu|fasuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fasuchuthul|fasuchuthul]] || [[word:fasuchujul|fasuchujul]] || [[word:fasuchushul|fasuchushul]] || [[word:fasuchukul|fasuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fasuchuthuthu|fasuchuthuthu]] || [[word:fasuchujuju|fasuchujuju]] || [[word:fasuchushushu|fasuchushushu]] || [[word:fasuchuku|fasuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fasuchuthun|fasuchuthun]] || [[word:fasuchujun|fasuchujun]] || [[word:fasuchushun|fasuchushun]] || [[word:fasuchukun|fasuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fasuchuthuoro|fasuchuthuoro]] || [[word:fasuchujuoro|fasuchujuoro]] || [[word:fasuchushuoro|fasuchushuoro]] || [[word:fasuchukuoro|fasuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
